name: change-default
instruction: Change the default price in `find_price` from `0` to `-1` when the product is not found. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. `list.first(xs)` returns `Option[A]`. `list.sort_by(xs, (x) => key)` sorts ascending.
